description: A black-and-white candid photograph (no on-image text or graphic design) showing a group of people, mostly men in work shirts and ball caps, photographed from behind as they stand facing a large American flag hung on the corrugated-metal back wall of an industrial workshop or hangar. Visible on the back of one person's shirt is 'I [heart] TRADES / WE SUPPORT MANUFACTURING'. The image is a documentary/atmospheric shot evoking patriotism and blue-collar/manufacturing labor, consistent with the tweet text 'AMERICA FIRST.' While it carries patriotic messaging, it is a plain photograph rather than a designed graphic or meme.
notable_text: (no designed on-image text; one shirt reads 'I [heart] TRADES / WE SUPPORT MANUFACTURING')
